lines.english: When was the last time this country
lines.raw: When was the last time this country | 这个国家上次是何时

lines.english: hosted the Olympic Games?
lines.raw: hosted the Olympic Games? | 举办奥运会的？

lines.english: The Olympic Games will be held
lines.raw: The Olympic Games will be held | 奥运会将在

lines.english: in our country in four years' time.
lines.raw: in our country in four years' time. | 四年后在我国举行。

lines.english: As a great many people will be
lines.raw: As a great many people will be | 由于很多人将会

lines.english: visiting the country,
lines.raw: visiting the country, | 访问这个国家，

lines.english: the government will be building new hotels,
lines.raw: the government will be building new hotels, | 政府将建造新酒店、

lines.english: an immense stadium,
lines.raw: an immense stadium, | 一个巨大的体育场，

lines.english: and a new Olympic-standard swimming pool.
lines.chinese: 和一个符合奥运标准的新游泳池。
lines.raw: and a new Olympic-standard swimming pool. | 和一个符合奥运标准的新游泳池。

lines.english: They will also be building new roads
lines.raw: They will also be building new roads | 他们还将修建新道路

lines.english: and a special railway line.
lines.raw: and a special railway line. | 和一条专用铁路线。

lines.english: The Games will be held just outside the capital
lines.chinese: 奥运会将在首都郊外举行，
lines.raw: The Games will be held just outside the capital | 奥运会将在首都郊外举行，

lines.english: and the whole area will be called 'Olympic City'.
lines.chinese: 整个地区将被命名为“奥运城”。
lines.raw: and the whole area will be called 'Olympic City'. | 整个地区将被命名为“奥运城”。

lines.english: Workers will have completed the new roads
lines.raw: Workers will have completed the new roads | 工人们将在今年年底

lines.english: by the end of this year.
lines.raw: by the end of this year. | 完成新道路的修建。

lines.english: By the end of next year,
lines.raw: By the end of next year, | 到明年年底，

lines.english: they will have finished work on the new stadium.
lines.chinese: 他们将完成新体育场的建设工作。
lines.raw: they will have finished work on the new stadium. | 他们将完成新体育场的建设工作。

lines.english: The fantastic modern buildings have been designed
lines.chinese: 这些奇妙的现代化建筑已由
lines.raw: The fantastic modern buildings have been designed | 这些奇妙的现代化建筑已由

lines.english: by Kurt Gunter.
lines.raw: by Kurt Gunter. | 库尔特·冈瑟设计。

lines.english: Everybody will be watching anxiously
lines.chinese: 每个人都会焦急地关注
lines.raw: Everybody will be watching anxiously | 每个人都会焦急地关注

lines.english: as the new buildings go up.
lines.raw: as the new buildings go up. | 这些新建筑的建成。

lines.english: We are all very excited and are looking forward to
lines.chinese: 我们都非常兴奋并期待着
lines.raw: We are all very excited and are looking forward to | 我们都非常兴奋并期待着

lines.english: the Olympic Games because
lines.raw: the Olympic Games because | 奥运会的到来，因为

lines.english: they have never been held before in this country.
lines.chinese: 这个国家以前从未举办过奥运会。
lines.raw: they have never been held before in this country. | 这个国家以前从未举办过奥运会。
